featured_findings.title: Stale Price Oracle Data
featured_findings.description: The Equilibrium lending protocol was using oracle prices without validating freshness. Sanctifier detected that price queries were not checking timestamp boundaries, allowing attackers to exploit stale prices for undercollateralized borrows.
featured_findings.impact: Potential loss of ~$2.3M in collateral due to 15-minute stale price window
featured_findings.patch_summary: Implemented 60-second maximum age check on all oracle price queries

featured_findings.title: Reentrancy via Cross-Contract Calls
featured_findings.description: Sanctifier's static analysis flagged an unsafe calling pattern in the bridge contract where external calls were made before state updates completed. This could allow attackers to re-enter the contract during the cross-chain message processing.
featured_findings.impact: Potential double-spend of bridged assets worth $5M+
featured_findings.patch_summary: Implemented checks-effects-interactions (CEI) pattern; moved all state updates before external calls

featured_findings.title: Integer Overflow in AMM Calculations
featured_findings.description: Sanctifier detected multiple unchecked arithmetic operations in the AMM's liquidity calculations. During large swaps, precision loss and undetected overflows could lead to incorrect exchange rates and economic losses.
featured_findings.impact: Loss of approximately $800K for liquidity providers over several transactions
featured_findings.patch_summary: Replaced all unchecked arithmetic with checked_add/checked_mul operations; added overflow guards

featured_findings.title: Missing Authorization in Admin Functions
featured_findings.description: Sanctifier's auth_gap detector identified that the mint() admin function was missing require_auth() check, allowing any caller to create unlimited tokens.
featured_findings.impact: Could lead to inflation of all issued assets on Soroban
featured_findings.patch_summary: Added require_auth() guard to all privileged functions; implemented role-based access control

featured_findings.title: Unbounded Loop Resource Exhaustion
featured_findings.description: Sanctifier flagged an unbounded loop iterating over all delegators during reward distribution. With many stakers, this could exceed instruction limits and cause contract execution failure.
featured_findings.impact: Denial of service affecting reward distribution; blocked users from claiming stakes
featured_findings.patch_summary: Implemented pagination for delegator iteration; rewards distributed in batches
